backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the accident documentation backend, defining data types (AccidentReport, UserProfile, VehicleInfo, etc.) and providing shared functions for managing accident reports, user profiles, photo uploads, and fault analysis with access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features—Highway Code rule mapping, Road Traffic Act 1988 section mapping, and a collapsible Legal Reference panel in ReportDetail—to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Legal Accident Documentation App', mounting the app at #root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for new report (/), reports list (/reports), and report detail (/reports/$reportId), wrapped in a QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/AccidentReportFo: Multi-section accident report creation form collecting vehicle info, speed, incident details, surroundings, and photos, then submitting via the useCreateReport mutation and navigating to the new report's detail page.
frontend/src/components/DiscrepancyAlert: Alert component that renders a destructive warning when a red-light violation is detected, displaying witness testimony versus AI-detected traffic signal state side-by-side with adjuster action guidance.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header containing navigation buttons for New Report and My Reports (with active-state styling), a main content Outlet, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LegalReferencePa: A collapsible panel component that displays relevant UK Highway Code and Road Traffic Act 1988 legal references based on detected violations, merging violation-specific and general references with deduplication.
frontend/src/components/LiabilityDisplay: Displays a visual liability split between two parties as a proportional bar and percentage breakdown cards, with color-coded indicators based on fault percentage levels.
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallery.tsx: Renders a grid of accident photos from binary image data as blob URLs, with a lightbox dialog for full-size viewing and previous/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUpload.tsx: Handles photo file selection and preview for accident scene images, converting files to ExternalBlob instances and enforcing a configurable maximum photo count.
frontend/src/components/ReportDetail.tsx: Displays a full accident report detail page including liability assessment, detected violations, legal references, vehicle information, and a photo gallery.
frontend/src/components/ReportList.tsx: Displays a paginated, sorted list of accident reports with thumbnails, fault badges, violation counts, and vehicle info, navigating to individual report pages on click.
frontend/src/components/SpeedDisplay.tsx: Renders calculated vehicle velocity in both m/s and mph with color-coded styling and a speed label derived from utility functions.
frontend/src/components/TrafficSignsDisp: Displays a list of detected traffic signs with type-specific icons, color-coded confidence badges, position info, and detection timestamps.
frontend/src/components/ViolationsDispla: Renders detected traffic violations in a card with type-specific icons and destructive styling, or a green no-violations state if the list is empty.
frontend/src/data/legalReferences.ts: Static lookup table mapping violation types (Stop Sign, U-turn, Traffic Signal, speeding) to relevant UK Highway Code rules and Road Traffic Act 1988 sections.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching/creating accident reports and user profiles, including mutation logic that converts photo blobs, builds metadata, and detects traffic signs from description text before calling the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVelocityCalculatio: Custom hook that computes velocity in m/s and mph from distance and time inputs using memoized calculations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/NewReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a heading and the AccidentReportForm for creating a new accident report.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that reads a report ID from URL params, fetches the report, and renders a loading skeleton, error state, or the ReportDetail component.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Page component that displays a heading and the ReportList component for viewing all saved accident reports.
frontend/src/utils/speedColorCoding.ts: Utility functions that return Tailwind CSS class strings and label text based on speed thresholds (low/medium/high in mph).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL and sessionStorage parameters, supporting both query strings and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends theme with custom fonts, shadows, border radii, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the UK road traffic incident reporting app's current features, architectural notes, known issues, and pending feature requests (case law references, contributory negligence framework, fault matrix).
